summary: A Goodreads author profile for Oprah Winfrey containing a brief biographical overview, a list of her published books, and a selection of popular quotes attributed to her by the community.

principles.statement: Cultivate gratitude for what you currently possess.
principles.rationale: Appreciating what you have leads to abundance, whereas focusing on lack ensures you will never feel satisfied.
principles.source_quote: Be thankful for what you have; you'll end up having more. If you concentrate on what you don't have, you will never, ever have enough.

principles.statement: Transform your pain into personal growth.
principles.rationale: Adversity and past hurts should be used as learning experiences to gain insight.

heuristics: You can have it all. Just not all at once.

signature_quotes.text: You can have it all. Just not all at once.
Be thankful for what you have; you'll end up having more. If you concentrate on what you don't have, you will never, ever have enough.

anti_patterns.description: Concentrating on what you lack rather than what you have.
anti_patterns.why_it_fails: It creates a mindset of scarcity where you will never, ever feel like you have enough.
